text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, though still pre-debut, secures a place in the exalted
Sprout Kinen. It's an amazing accomplishment and the talk of the
academy.

The exhibition race will be held at the Tokyo Racecourse, where most
legendary runners first come to prominence.

I'm sure many are eager with excitement to see the Beast in action.
However, the unforeseen happens...

Biwa Hayahide is called by student council president Symboli Rudolf
for an urgent meeting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You want me to race on her behalf?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What... what is the meaning of this, President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand that this is sudden and a lot to process. We are just as
thunderstruck as you are.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But the reality is this... Narita Brian has come down with a fever.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The racer chosen to take her place in the Sprout Kinen is you. So I ask
again, Biwa Hayahide, will you heed the call?

This is her chance. If she can race against top runners in the Sprout
Kinen, it should help her get closer to completing the winning
equation.
Knowing that, I encourage her to join.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Impossible. I'm not at that level—Brian's level.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm no replacement for her!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I disagree. You—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I know her capabilities more than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I lost my composure.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about Brian's condition. Before I make any decisions, I
would like to go see my sister.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. I apologize for not giving due consideration.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However... there is, frankly, no time to spare. I expect your decision
soon.

Hayahide is anxious as we go to check on Narita Brian. At the
hospital, we're told the ailing racer has just taken some medicine and
fallen asleep.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She looks terrible. I'm always telling her to take better care of herself,
but she never listens...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's the exact opposite of before.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It was a long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Her physical abilities began to surpass mine. No longer able to keep
up, I started training recklessly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But my sister—even though she was so young—was worried about me.
And one day, while we were playing tag...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I should've treated it as a friendly game between sisters, as a proper
older sibling would.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No. No matter how fast I ran, I was unable to catch up to her. I grew
more and more desperate, eventually neglecting to watch where I was
going... I crashed into a fence and wound up in the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
While I was completely bedridden, Brian kept improving her speed on
her own.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't move—all I could do was use my head. That's when I
began to persist in my studies.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In bed, I sank myself into my notes and books, constructing theories
day in and day out. I even gave one the grand title of the "winning
equation."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But... You know what, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not once in all this time have I ever been able to predict Narita Brian
and her pure instincts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She always exceeds my calculations. She destroys all my equations. She's an anomaly that I cannot solve!

Her words are filled with suffering... And I realize she's been holding
this pain inside the whole time.

No matter how hard she thinks, the Beast always bests her theories.
But even now, she pushes on, always planning and formulating.
choice_data_list: And that's how you gained your unique ability.
And that's how you gained your unique ability.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Your theories are an unrivaled force.
Your theories are an unrivaled force.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I told you, I've never been accurate when it comes to Brian. No matter
how hard I try, I'll never surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I still haven't been able to prove any of my theories—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You? How so?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In tomorrow's race, I'll stay near the lead until the final corner. The
front pack will be tightly grouped together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Following the last turn, I'll pass them from outside.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Then I will gain a lead of no less than ten lengths—and place first.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Three... two... one.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Time to confirm my calculations!
I still remember how my chest pounded with excitement back then.

The way she talked about her calculations made my heart dance. I
couldn't help but want to work together and bring her theories to
fruition!
I was completely captivated by her brilliant winning equation!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list:
Let's solve your equation and seize
victory—together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why? Do you truly believe that I can reach her level?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: He's not the only one who believes in you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: She's not the only one who believes in you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: There's something of vital importance that I forgot to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Vital importance?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the one who so strongly recommended you above all others as
Narita Brian's replacement...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: —was Narita Brian herself. She said it must be you.

Biwa Hayahide gasps in total shock, but her expression quickly shifts
to one filled with determination.
She is ready to do what's necessary.
